entity.label: Olympas
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: A Roman Christian whom Paul salutes (Rom. 16:15).

nodes.label: Olympas
nodes.description: A Roman Christian whom Paul salutes (Rom. 16:15).

verses.text: Salute Philologus, and Julia, Nereus, and his sister, and Olympas, and all the saints which are with them.
